caption: In a room with vertical wooden slats in the background, a group of people are gathered for a performance. A woman on the left wears a light green cardigan and a colorful scarf, holding a piece of sheet music. To her right, a man wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a dark vest stands before a microphone. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. The text "ORCA" appears in white on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks or sings into the microphone, moving his hand slightly towards his chest. The woman remains still, looking forward while holding her music. The lighting remains consistent, and the positioning of the people and the background elements remains stable throughout the clip.
